string.text: This is a custom bullpup configuration shotgun, derived from a Saiga-12S. This gun originated as some gunsmith's personal project, how it got into the Zone is anyone's guess. Several modifications were made, including the relocation of the charging handle to the left side of the receiver. As a result of these modifications, this gun features slightly improved accuracy and less felt recoil than a conventional Saiga, though its cyclic rate has beeen reduced as a result. Its small size also improves its suitability to close quarters operations, though the bullpup configuration may feel awkward to some.\n %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:\n %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] PBS-1

The Saiga-23 was developed by mechanics of the Zone for stalkers hunting the toughest of mutants. Inspired by the russian prototype KS-23K, this gun was based off the Saiga-12 and built as a bullpup for greater mobility. The weapon was then rechambered to fire 23x75mm shotgun shells and refitted with a 510mm KS-23 barrel. The result is an extremely deadly close range weapon.
Modified Saiga-12S magazine with capacity for 8 shotshells. This magazine has been retooled for 23x75mm shotgun shells.
Extended Saiga-12S magazine with capacity for 12 shotshells. This magazine has been retooled for 23x75mm shotgun shells. More shells means more mutants you can kill each each magazine.
